title: Creamy British Yeast Extract Stir-fry
description: A salty and gooey weeknight dish featuring a fusion of chilli sauce, fermented flavors, and gluten-free-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Gluten-Free Gluten-Free Spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish with subtle flavors

instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add oil.
Add minced garlic, cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in chilli sauce, let it simmer for about 1 minute to release its flavor.
Pour in the creamy British yeast extract. Stir quickly as it tends to foam.
If using gluten-free spices, add them now and stir well.
Add chopped green onions, continue stirring until evenly coated with sauce mixture.
Adjust seasoning if needed, and serve immediately.
